title: potentilla recta var. obscura
intro: Potentilla recta var. obscura, also known as the Obscure Cinquefoil, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the Rosaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, as well as its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems. The health benefits of Potentilla recta var. obscura include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, diarrhea, and stomach ulcers, as well as its use in treating wounds and reducing inflammation. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves can be used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be administered orally to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
